## Risk

## Checklist

- [ ] Built the project with `npm run build`
- [ ] If gameplay changed, ran an appropriate harness scenario or batch
- [ ] If visuals changed, checked the live game or recorded output
- [ ] Updated docs/plan if the change affected workflow or project direction
